creator: ishidat@mars.dti.ne.jp
text:
In the port for guileobjc, guileobjc/work/guileobjc-0.3.8/Makefile 
may be wrong.  "make install" fails by stripping the file goconfig, 
that is shell sclipt.

Fix: 

I succeeded to install by changing the line
INSTALL_SCRIPT = ${INSTALL_PROGRAM}
to 
INSTALL_SCRIPT = ${INSTALL}.
